description.source: Your platform complies with WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility standards.
description.target: Your platform complies with WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility standards.

body:0002.source: GoVocal platforms are designed with accessibility in mind and comply with the WCAG 2.2 AA standards. This means the platform is built to be usable by people with various disabilities, including visual, auditory, motor, and cognitive impairments.
body:0002.target: GoVocal platforms are designed with accessibility in mind and comply with the WCAG 2.2 AA standards. This means the platform is built to be usable by people with various disabilities, including visual, auditory, motor, and cognitive impairments.

body:0003.source: We undergo regular third-party audits on our demo environment, which uses the same codebase as your platform. Based on audit feedback and user input, we make ongoing improvements. Each platform includes an accessibility statement, linked in the footer, outlining features and known limitations.
body:0003.target: We undergo regular third-party audits on our demo environment, which uses the same codebase as your platform. Based on audit feedback and user input, we make ongoing improvements. Each platform includes an accessibility statement, linked in the footer, outlining features and known limitations.

body:0004.source: We are committed to continually enhancing platform accessibility. If you notice any barriers or have suggestions, reach out to support@govocal.com. Your input helps us improve the experience for everyone.
body:0004.target: We are committed to continually enhancing platform accessibility. If you notice any barriers or have suggestions, reach out to support@govocal.com. Your input helps us improve the experience for everyone.

body:0005.source: You can also download our detailed accessibility report to learn more here:
body:0005.target: You can also download our detailed accessibility report to learn more here:

body:0008.source: Full Keyboard Navigation: Users can navigate the entire platform without a mouse.
body:0008.target: Full Keyboard Navigation: Users can navigate the entire platform without a mouse.

body:0009.source: Screen Reader Compatibility: Content and interactions are designed to work with screen readers.
body:0009.target: Screen Reader Compatibility: Content and interactions are designed to work with screen readers.

body:0010.source: Alt-Text Support: Admins can add descriptive alt-text to images in the backend.
body:0010.target: Alt-Text Support: Admins can add descriptive alt-text to images in the backend.

body:0011.source: Color Contrast Warnings: The platform ensures strong contrast for fixed colors, and warns if chosen custom colors don’t meet contrast requirements.
body:0011.target: Color Contrast Warnings: The platform ensures strong contrast for fixed colors, and warns if chosen custom colors don’t meet contrast requirements.

body:0012.source: Responsive Design: The platform adapts to all screen sizes and devices.
body:0012.target: Responsive Design: The platform adapts to all screen sizes and devices.

body:0013.source: For a full list of requirements, consult the official WCAG 2.2 guidelines.
body:0013.target: For a full list of requirements, consult the official WCAG 2.2 guidelines.

body:0014.source: Can I edit the default accessibility policy page?
body:0014.target: Can I edit the default accessibility policy page?

body:0015.source: While the built-in accessibility page cannot be edited directly, you can replace it with a custom version via a simple workaround.
body:0015.target: While the built-in accessibility page cannot be edited directly, you can replace it with a custom version via a simple workaround.

body:0016.source: Why is the Accessibility Page Locked?
body:0016.target: Why is the Accessibility Page Locked?

body:0017.source: To ensure compliance with international WCAG 2.2 AA standards, the default accessibility page on your platform is locked and cannot be edited through the admin interface.
body:0017.target: To ensure compliance with international WCAG 2.2 AA standards, the default accessibility page on your platform is locked and cannot be edited through the admin interface.

body:0018.source: This content was developed in collaboration with AnySurfer, a Belgian agency specialising in digital accessibility, and reflects the shared commitment of GoVocal to accessible design.
body:0018.target: This content was developed in collaboration with AnySurfer, a Belgian agency specialising in digital accessibility, and reflects the shared commitment of GoVocal to accessible design.

body:0019.source: Workaround: Replacing the Page with a Custom Version
body:0019.target: Workaround: Replacing the Page with a Custom Version

body:0020.source: You can still provide your own policy or link to an external one by following these steps:
body:0020.target: You can still provide your own policy or link to an external one by following these steps:

body:0022.source: In the admin back-office, go to:
body:0022.target: In the admin back-office, go to:

body:0025.source: Copy the text from the current Accessibility Policy page, paste it into the new page, and make your desired edits.
body:0025.target: Copy the text from the current Accessibility Policy page, paste it into the new page, and make your desired edits.

body:0027.source: Once you're happy with the content, publish the new page.
body:0027.target: Once you're happy with the content, publish the new page.

body:0029.source: Send the URL of your custom page to the GoVocal support team via the chat bubble.
body:0029.target: Send the URL of your custom page to the GoVocal support team via the chat bubble.

body:0030.source: Support will replace the footer link to point to your new page.
body:0030.target: Support will replace the footer link to point to your new page.

body:0032.source: This method does not affect accessibility compliance of the platform itself, only the wording and presentation of the accessibility statement.
body:0032.target: This method does not affect accessibility compliance of the platform itself, only the wording and presentation of the accessibility statement.

body:0033.source: You may also use this method to link out to an external accessibility statement, such as a page on your municipal or organisational website.
body:0033.target: You may also use this method to link out to an external accessibility statement, such as a page on your municipal or organisational website.

body:0034.source: What you can do to support accessibility?
body:0034.target: What you can do to support accessibility?

body:0037.source: Apply structured headings (H1, H2, etc.) for logical navigation
body:0037.target: Apply structured headings (H1, H2, etc.) for logical navigation

body:0040.source: Ensure PDFs have a readable order, tags, and alt-text for images
body:0040.target: Ensure PDFs have a readable order, tags, and alt-text for images

body:0042.source: Provide captions for videos and transcripts for audio
body:0042.target: Provide captions for videos and transcripts for audio

body:0044.source: Use screen readers or other assistive tech to test your platform
body:0044.target: Use screen readers or other assistive tech to test your platform

body:0046.source: Educate staff on accessibility best practices
body:0046.target: Educate staff on accessibility best practices

body:0047.source: Do we support external accessibility tools?
body:0047.target: Do we support external accessibility tools?

body:0048.source: We understand some clients may want to add external accessibility overlays or tools. However, because our platform is built with accessibility from the ground up, additional tools may conflict with the user experience or even introduce bugs.
body:0048.target: We understand some clients may want to add external accessibility overlays or tools. However, because our platform is built with accessibility from the ground up, additional tools may conflict with the user experience or even introduce bugs.

body:0049.source: For a consistent, high-quality experience, we do not support third-party accessibility tool integrations.
body:0049.target: For a consistent, high-quality experience, we do not support third-party accessibility tool integrations.
